items.name: Crimson Noir Modest Coat Dress [PBR]
items.description:
🖤🌹 Dark elegance meets bold florals in this refined, modest fashion statement!
This layered coat dress combines a striking black inner outfit with a dramatic outer coat patterned in red, white, and black blossoms. The flared sleeves, ruffled edges, and soft draping create a sophisticated silhouette, while the oversized black bow on the chest adds a touch of classic femininity. With its rich contrast and couture-inspired design, this piece is perfect for gothic-themed worlds, high-fashion NPCs, elegant roleplay characters, or anyone seeking modest style with strong visual impact. PBR textures enhance the fabric depth, print clarity, and natural folds for a premium experience.
🔍 Keywords: modest, floral, gothic, coat dress, elegant, layered, bow, couture, fashion, PBR, dramatic
Let your avatar express powerful elegance with this couture-inspired modest ensemble.
This model includes high-quality PBR textures.
